reviews.comment:
Dependiendo de la época, tardas al menos entre 20 minutos y media hora en cargar combustible. Siempre lleno de pasajeros, los baños mal cuidados o inaccesible ya que los tienen que estar limpiando siempre. El Shop descuidado y loa precios caros.

(Translated by Google)
Depending on the time of year, it takes at least 20 to 30 minutes to refuel. It's always packed with passengers, the restrooms are poorly maintained or inaccessible because they're constantly being cleaned. The shop is neglected and the prices are high.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Marcelo! lamentamos su mala experiencia en nuestra estación...Gracias por su comentario, nos ayuda a mejorar nuestros servicios! Lo esperamos nuevamente.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsbE4zZEdWMjVIZFRWUlExTkdYMVJQTm1KaWVWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ya es la tercera vez que me pasa lo mismo. Están tomando mates y hasta que no se juntan 3 o 4 autos no salen.

(Translated by Google)
This is the third time this has happened to me. They're drinking mate and they don't leave until three or four cars have gathered.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Emanuel.. te pido disculpas, y agradezco tu comentario.. nos ayuda a mejorar nuestros servicios! Hasta la proxima!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tsdlFWQk1ka2d6TnpCcE9FWXlUWEpMU2tZNFRYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos en enero 2026 a comer algo por la noche, muy descuidada por ser una YPF . No le funcionaban los aires , solo uno andaba y no daba a basto. Muchas moscas adentro. Y los techos estaban como que le entró agua. Poca variedad cosas para comer . Lo que si se desteca la buena atención . Súper amables todos . Nos hicieron las hamburguesas muy bien. Espero que puedan mejorarla.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped in January 2026 for a bite to eat. It was quite run-down, as you'd expect from a YPF gas station. The air conditioning wasn't working; only one unit was on, and it wasn't enough. There were a lot of flies inside. And the ceilings looked like they'd leaked. There wasn't much variety in the food. However, the service was excellent. Everyone was super friendly. They made our hamburgers really well. I hope they can improve.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Natalia! Muchas gracias por tu comentario, nos ayuda a mejorar nuestros servicios. Saludos!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KWlRXWTFTVlJQUnpWZmNFOVlRVXhpT0ZOZlNWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Acabo de salir del Full comprando unas tortillitas muy ricas. El señor que atiende me dijo que no cargaba puntos Serviclub. Un señor mayor, gordito, tonada de porteños, poco simpático. Le pregunté al playero si ya no trabajaban con Serviclub y me dijo que tanto en la playa de combustible con en el bar SI se suman puntos. No sé cual será la razón de que el señor que atiende NO QUISO sumar los puntos de mi compra, pero ni siquiera buenas tardes. Hay de todo. Ojalá el dueño lea esta opinión

(Translated by Google)
I just left the Full station after buying some delicious tortillas. The man who served me told me he didn't accept Serviclub points. He was an older, chubby man with a Buenos Aires accent, and not very friendly. I asked the attendant if they no longer worked with Serviclub, and he said that points are earned both at the gas station and in the bar. I don't know why the man refused to accept the points for my purchase, and he didn't even say good afternoon. There's all sorts of people out there. I hope the owner reads this review.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Angel! Lamento que no haya sido bien recibido. Respecto a los puntos serviclub, solo se pueden cargar en playa, en el Servicompras NO, ya que no somos Full.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNE4zbG1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para descansar y tomar algo para seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to rest and have something to eat before continuing your journey.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su reseña Fernando! Siempre es bienvenido!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205SVVqWlJOV2RYVG5nMFdVMWlRVTQzUVdSaWEwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos ayer cargando nafta, mucho tiempo de espera, demasiados vehículos para un solo playero!

(Translated by Google)
We were filling up with gas yesterday, the wait was very long, too many vehicles for just one attendant!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25JNFJFRjJSRjlrZEdsNllYRnlWRzVIVFhaM05IYxAB

reviews.comment:
Exelente la atención de la gente mayor que trabaja en el área de servicompras!! Te hacen sentir super cómodos. Exelente!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the older staff in the convenience store area is excellent! They make you feel very comfortable. Excellent!

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario Gastón! Nos alegra saber que fue bien atendido..Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGb2NVRTNRVUpHYzJOamFUQlBOWHBXTVhkS1gwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños sucios, mala atención si la gente pasa de viaje no esperen que sepamos cómo están organizados que de forma pésima y mal educad, lo único bueno es el café que hizo la máquina

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms, poor service; if people are just passing through, don't expect us to know how things are organized, which is terrible and rude. The only good thing is the coffee the machine made.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Damián! lamento su mala experiencia en nuestra estación. Prometemos mejorar!  Agradezco su comentario, Saludos!
